flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Amarillo College rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.2k → $15.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Amarillo College rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 (9.9% → 13.0%).
